title: crotalaria umbellifera
intro: Crotalaria umbellifera, also known as the yellow rattle, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria umbellifera include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria umbellifera are typically made from its leaves and roots, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or applied topically in the form of ointments or creams.
